## Tags
medicine, medical, needle, pump, plunger, nozzle, blood

## Categories
science, medical

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/syringe)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Syringe;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Syringe { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
